# 97 Design

> The design studio of 97 World — websites, landing pages, brand kits, logos, fliers and social packs for Uganda & South Sudan (and worldwide), ordered directly on WhatsApp with transparent upfront prices and a 50/50 deposit plan.

## What we do
- Websites (from $95) and landing pages — designed, coded, deployed
- Brand kits and logos
- Campaign fliers, posters, business cards, social media packs
- Turnarounds of 2–10 working days per service

## How ordering works
1. Build a quote at https://cartelug.github.io/97world-site/pricing.html (instant, UGX or USD)
2. Send it via https://cartelug.github.io/97world-site/start.html — it opens WhatsApp (+256 708 735 878)
3. A 50% deposit locks the build slot; the balance is due on delivery

## Proof
Live work including AFRICA63 (theafrica63.com) and Maya Nature Resort: https://cartelug.github.io/97world-site/work.html

- Home: https://cartelug.github.io/97world-site/

- Start a project: https://cartelug.github.io/97world-site/start.html
